wikitext: []: I wrote about Eva 1.0 for money             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Sep 07, 2017 4:38 pm Hey guys how's it going. Any new Eva movies since I last visited? Anyway uhh, for the 10th anniversary of Evangelion 1.0 (!!!!) I leveraged my weeb-insider position at The Film Stage to do an overlong, nerdgasming writeup of the film and Anno's legacy in general in exchange for a sweet payday of literally hundreds of cents Here it is, all feedback is welcome
